results.pred_sql: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer GROUP BY Citizenship ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

results.question: Show different citizenships and the maximum net worth of singers of each citizenship.

results.question: Show titles of songs and names of singers.
results.gold: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID
results.pred_sql: SELECT song.Title, singer.Name FROM song JOIN singer ON song.Singer_ID = singer.Singer_ID

results.question: What are the song titles and singer names?
results.gold: SELECT T2.Title ,  T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID
results.pred_sql: SELECT song.Title, singer.Name FROM song JOIN singer ON song.Singer_ID = singer.Singer_ID

results.question: Show distinct names of singers that have songs with sales more than 300000.
results.gold: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID WHERE T2.Sales  >  300000
results.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
WHERE so.Sales > 300000;

results.question: what are the different names of the singers that have sales more than 300000?

results.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID

results.question: Show the names of singers that have more than one song.
results.gold: SELECT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1
results.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song song ON s.Singer_ID = song.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID
HAVING COUNT(song.Song_ID) > 1;

results.question: What are the names of the singers that have more than one songs?
results.gold: SELECT T1.Name FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name HAVING COUNT(*)  >  1
results.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name
FROM singer s
JOIN song song ON s.Singer_ID = song.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Singer_ID
HAVING COUNT(song.Song_ID) > 1;

results.question: Show the names of singers and the total sales of their songs.
results.gold: SELECT T1.Name ,  sum(T2.Sales) FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name
results.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name, SUM(so.Sales) AS Total_Sales
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Name;

results.question: For each singer name, what is the total sales for their songs?
results.gold: SELECT T1.Name ,  sum(T2.Sales) FROM singer AS T1 JOIN song AS T2 ON T1.Singer_ID  =  T2.Singer_ID GROUP BY T1.Name
results.pred_sql:
SELECT s.Name, SUM(so.Sales) AS Total_Sales
FROM singer s
JOIN song so ON s.Singer_ID = so.Singer_ID
GROUP BY s.Name;

results.question: Show the citizenship shared by singers with birth year before 1945 and after 1955.
results.gold: SELECT Citizenship FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year  <  1945 INTERSECT SELECT Citizenship FROM singer WHERE Birth_Year  >  1955

SELECT Citizenship 
FROM singer 
WHERE Birth_Year < 1945 
INTERSECT 
SELECT Citizenship 
FROM singer 
WHERE Birth_Year > 1955;

results.question: How many available features are there in total?
results.gold: SELECT count(*) FROM Other_Available_Features
results.pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(feature_id) AS total_available_features FROM Other_Available_Features;

results.question: What is the feature type name of feature AirCon?
results.gold: SELECT T2.feature_type_name FROM Other_Available_Features AS T1 JOIN Ref_Feature_Types AS T2 ON T1.feature_type_code  =  T2.feature_type_code WHERE T1.feature_name  =  "AirCon"
results.pred_sql: SELECT feature_type_name FROM Ref_Feature_Types WHERE feature_type_code = (SELECT feature_type_code FROM Other_Available_Features WHERE feature_name = 'AirCon');

results.question: Show the property type descriptions of properties belonging to that code.
results.gold: SELECT T2.property_type_description FROM Properties AS T1 JOIN Ref_Property_Types AS T2 ON T1.property_type_code  =  T2.property_type_code GROUP BY T1.property_type_code

results.question: What are the names of properties that are either houses or apartments with more than 1 room?
results.gold: SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "House" UNION SELECT property_name FROM Properties WHERE property_type_code  =  "Apartment" AND room_count  >  1
